page.title: Audit log
page.description: Every sensitive action (void, delete, conversion) is recorded here — atomically with the operation that produced it.

history.title: Recent audit events
history.description: Reverse-chronological. Use the filters to narrow the view to a specific action, resource, or date range.
history.empty: No audit events yet. Sensitive actions like transfer voids, quotation deletes, and quote conversions show up here.
